name: Codeshot
description: Codeshot — Automated app store screenshot generation tool for iOS and Android supporting multiple device sizes and locales.

seo.title: Codeshot — Release / App Store Operations
seo.meta_description: Codeshot: Codeshot — Automated app store screenshot generation tool for iOS and Android supporting multiple device sizes and locales.

when_to_use: Automated App Store screenshot generation for multiple device sizes
Localized screenshot creation for 10+ language App Store submissions
CI/CD-integrated screenshot pipeline for iOS and Android release workflow
Consistent on-brand store listing visuals without manual Figma exports

pros: Automates store screenshots for many device sizes
Multi-locale support in a single pipeline
Saves hours versus manual screenshot work
Fits into CI to regenerate on each release
cons: Limited polish vs tools like Fastlane snapshot + design
Not a replacement for marketing-grade creative
review.verdict: Handy utility for devs who hate making store screenshots, but marketing teams will often want more control.
review.best_for: Indie devs and small teams automating store screenshot generation
review.not_for: Brands needing heavily custom marketing screenshot designs
